name: 30"x 36" Snowflakes on Blue Christmas Gift Sack - Wondershop™
description:
Elevate the look of your family Christmas gifts with the Christmas Family Santa Sack Snowflakes on Blue from Wondershop™. This blue gift bag has a sack-like design with allover snowflake print in white for a delightfully festive look. Made of plastic, this Santa sack bag makes a perfect pick for packaging a wide variety of gifts.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
